title: Blockset Consistency
description: All the blocks you've ever wanted!
body:
## Information
This mod adds the blocks that are missing from some blocksets. This does not add any _new_ blocksets or block types, it only fills in the gaps in vanilla's blocksets.

## Disclaimer
This is still being worked on and doesn't yet support my Vertical Slab Placement mod. It also lacks unlocks for the recipes, so you'll have to manually grant them or craft the items once each by hand.

## List of blocks

### Stone

<details>
<summary></summary>

-   Stone Wall
-   Smooth Stone Stairs
-   Smooth Stone Wall
-   Cracked Stone Brick Stairs
-   Cracked Stone Brick Slab
-   Cracked Stone Brick Wall

</details>


### Other stones

<details>
<summary></summary>

-   Polished Granite Wall
-   Polished Diorite Wall
-   Polished Andesite Wall

</details>


### Deepslate

<details>
<summary></summary>

-   Deepslate Stairs
-   Deepslate Slab
-   Deepslate Wall
-   Cracked Deepslate Brick Stairs
-   Cracked Deepslate Brick Slab
-   Cracked Deepslate Brick Wall
-   Cracked Deepslate Tile Stairs
-   Cracked Deepslate Tile Slab
-   Cracked Deepslate Tile Wall

</details>
